appearance.backgroundImageHint: URL of an image to use as the background of the hero banner and top navigation

templates.confirmBody: Apply '{{name}}'? This will replace the page's current content.
templates.confirmBodySite: Replace the entire site with '{{name}}'? All current pages will be deleted and replaced, and the theme will change. This action cannot be undone.

descriptions.communication-home: A communication homepage with news, announcements, events and a media gallery.
descriptions.hr-portal: An HR page with welfare, new hires, org chart and FAQ.
descriptions.onboarding: An onboarding journey with procedures, FAQ and org chart.
descriptions.employee-hub: An employee hub with search, directory, polls and a swap board.
descriptions.training: A training page with spotlights, procedures and FAQ.

siteDescriptions.communication-site: A corporate communication site with a news homepage and a linked training section.
siteDescriptions.hr-site: An HR site with an HR portal and a linked onboarding journey.
siteDescriptions.onboarding-site: An onboarding site with a guided journey and a linked HR portal.
siteDescriptions.employee-hub-site: An employee hub site with search, directory and a linked communication section.
siteDescriptions.training-site: A training site with a linked onboarding journey.

props.noSelectionHint: Click a block on the canvas to configure its properties

content.manualBanner: In manual mode, the content entered here is what gets published to production.
content.urlHint: Enter a URL for the external source, then add sample data for the preview.

deploy.title: Deploying to SharePoint
deploy.errorDefault: Unable to reach the provisioning service. Make sure the backend is running and try again.

tabs.blocks: The catalog of content blocks you can drag onto site pages.
tabs.pages: Manage the site's page structure and tree.
tabs.appearance: Customize the site name, visual theme, background and brand color.
tabs.templates: Apply ready-made templates to a single page or the whole site.

blockCategories.COMMUNICATION: Blocks for company news, events and internal communications.
blockCategories.LEARNING: Blocks for training, spotlights and employee engagement.
blockCategories.PRODUCTIVITY: Everyday utility blocks: procedures, quick links, weather and more.
blockCategories.KNOWLEDGE_BASE: Blocks for search, FAQ, org chart and company information.

blocks.news-corporate: Shows the latest corporate-wide company news.
blocks.news-country: Shows news specific to the selected country.
blocks.news-sede: Shows news specific to the selected location.
blocks.news-funzione: Shows news specific to the selected business function.
blocks.commenti-contenuto: Enables user comments under a piece of content.
blocks.like-contenuto: Enables user likes on a piece of content.
blocks.avvisi-homepage: Shows important alerts featured on the homepage.
blocks.eventi-country: Shows events specific to the selected country.
blocks.eventi-sede: Shows events specific to the selected location.
blocks.eventi-funzione: Shows events specific to the selected business function.
blocks.sezione-fiere: Lists trade shows the company is taking part in.
blocks.sezione-mostre: Lists company exhibitions and cultural events.
blocks.multimedia-gallery: A gallery of company photos and videos.
blocks.countdown-lancio: A countdown to the launch of an initiative or product.
blocks.rassegna-stampa: A collection of press articles mentioning the company.
blocks.bacheca-scambio: A board for swap/wanted posts between colleagues.
blocks.linkedin-feed: Shows the latest posts from the company LinkedIn page.
blocks.new-entry: Introduces employees who recently joined the company.
blocks.oggi-presentiamo: Spotlights a person, project or initiative.
blocks.polls-survey: Create polls and surveys to collect employee feedback.
blocks.sezione-welfare: Lists the welfare initiatives available to employees.
blocks.kudos: Shows public recognition shared between colleagues.
blocks.feedback-utenti: Collects user feedback on the intranet or its content.
blocks.meteo: Shows the weather forecast for the selected country.
blocks.fusi-orari: Shows the current time across the company's main time zones.
blocks.multilingua: Lets visitors switch the site's display language.
blocks.collegamenti-rapidi: A list of quick links to company resources or tools.
blocks.titolo-libero: A free-text heading to introduce a section.
blocks.embed-custom: Embeds external content via a custom embed code.
blocks.motore-ricerca: A search bar for finding content within the intranet.
blocks.faq: A list of frequently asked questions and answers.
blocks.rubrica-colleghi: Lets users search for and contact colleagues.
blocks.contatti-chiave: Lists the key contacts most useful to employees.
blocks.documenti: Lists important company documents and files.
blocks.chi-siamo: Introduces the company's history and values.
blocks.desc-funzione: Describes the selected business function (general information).
blocks.calendario-eventi: Shows this month's events in a calendar view.
blocks.carosello-contenuti: A scrollable carousel of featured content, with slide navigation.
blocks.timeline-aziendale: Tells the company's story and key milestones in chronological order.

appearanceSections.siteName: The site name shown in the header and hero banner.
appearanceSections.template: Choose one of the predefined visual themes for the site.
appearanceSections.backgroundImage: Set a background image for the hero banner and top navigation, with automatically suggested colors.
appearanceSections.brandColor: The brand's main color, used for accents and active elements.

themeTemplates.corporate-classic: A dark, professional theme with a blue accent, suited to traditional corporate contexts.
themeTemplates.modern-light: A light, minimal theme with a teal accent, for a modern, airy look.
themeTemplates.dark-glass: A dark theme with a semi-transparent glass effect and a cyan accent, for a tech aesthetic.
themeTemplates.vibrant-color: A bold purple-and-orange theme for a daring, colorful brand.
